title: armeria villosa subsp. provillosa
intro: Armeria villosa subsp. provillosa, also known as the hairy thyme or woolly thistle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Armeria villosa subsp. provillosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe sore throats, and calm digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
